SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI

Class Cli

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.View
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.CLI.Cli
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class Cli extends View implements Runnable
The Cli class extends View and implements Runnable. It is used to provide a command-line interface (CLI) for the application. This class is responsible for handling CLI input and output and for running processes in a separate thread.

The class inherits methods from View and must implement the run() method from the Runnable interface.

  • Constructor Details

    • Cli

      public Cli()
      Creates a new instance of the Cli class

  • Method Details

    • run

      public void run()
      The main execution method of the Runnable interface. This method is called when the thread is started and contains the CLI logic.

      The run method performs the following steps:

      1. Prints the title by calling init().
      2. Prompts the user to choose a connection by calling chooseConnection().
      3. Starts a new thread to handle user input by invoking the readInputUser() method.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • chooseConnection

      public void chooseConnection()
      Prompts the user to choose a connection method and sets up the connection.

      The chooseConnection method allows the user to select between two connection methods: Socket and RMI. It prompts the user for an IP address and validates it. Based on the user's choice, it initializes either a SocketClient or an RMIClient and starts the connection.

      Steps performed by this method:

      1. Prompts the user to choose a connection method (Socket or RMI).
      2. Prompts the user to enter an IP address and validates it.
      3. Initializes the appropriate client based on the user's choice.
      4. Starts the client connection.
      Specified by:
      chooseConnection in class View
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if there is an exception while setting up the connection

      Notifies the CLI when a new player has joined the game.
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
